headline: Dawn Refill Launch Tests Consumer Habits And Supports Procter And Gamble Story
summary: Dawn, a Procter & Gamble brand, has introduced a new refill jug and an upgraded Platinum dish soap formula, focusing on convenience and sustainability. The changes highlight packaging aimed at reducing waste and a formula intended to improve cleaning performance for everyday users. This development comes as Procter & Gamble, ticker NYSE:PG, continues to adjust its product portfolio to evolving consumer habits. headline: Here’s why you shouldn’t add risk to your portfolio, according to BCA
summary: Investing.com -- Global financial markets are standing at a precarious crossroads as the persistent energy shock from the Middle East begins to outweigh inflation concerns, according to a quarterly outlook from BCA Research.
